inputs.text: 刘邦, Qin-Han transition period, practical uprising leader from Pei County, standing at the edge of a campaign tent with bamboo slips and plain banners, cloth robe, light leather armor, simple sword, hand on a campaign map, eyes lifted toward a distant battlefield, calm and tactical, not imperial, semi-realistic guofeng card illustration, ancient book paper grain, bronze and stone texture, dark palette with restrained gold accents, cinematic lighting, vertical 3:4 composition, no card frame baked into the art

modern clothes, modern weapon, sci-fi, fantasy monster, immortal cultivation, magic circle, alchemy furnace, cute chibi, anime moe, over saturated red gold, gore, parody, text artifact, watermark, logo, western fantasy armor, neon glow
